titleStmt.title: SII 15.96: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 96. (B.K. No. 201 of 1928-29.) AṆṆIGĒRI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the Hanumantadēva temple.
This record is dated the 2nd regnal year of the king, Īśvara, Pushya ba. 8, Wednesday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, corresponding to 1157 A.D., December 25, Wednesday f.d.t. °11.

It records a gift of land to the god Dhōrēśvara of Aṇṇigeṟe, known as Dakshiṇa-Vāraṇāsi, for worship and repairs, by Daṇḍanāyaka Śrīdharayya, the Perggaḍe of Beḷvala-nāḍu, in conjunction with his ministerial officials. The epigraph gives a brief account of the donor's family and describes Aṇṇigeṟe as the rājadhāni-paṭṭaṇa (chief town) of Beḷvala.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jādhinātha bandhura girisutāghanakucōdghakuṁkumasphurada .
. vṛtta . Ādi rāpuṭamaṁ bhujāsiyaṁbudhi nakhāgradiṁ tiṟidu
rātiya vipuḷājiraṁgadoḷkedaṟi viḷāsama dele kadana pracaṁḍanaṁ kadana doḷāṁparātinṛparā
rggaḷara bijjaṇa bhūmipāḷanaṁ . parabhūpāḷara jayalakṣmīkānteyaṁ taṁna tōḷveragiṁ ḷkoḷigoṁḍu
sādaraṁ tānidaccari vidviḍnṛpa kuṁbhakuṁbha . bhīkarabhujaṁ bi
jjakṣamāpāḷakaṁ . © svasti samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāḷāṁjara puravarādhīsvaraṁ suvarṇna
vṛṣabhadhvajaṁ ḍamarugatūryyanirgghōṣaṇaṁ kaḷacuriya kuḷakamaḷa mārttaṇḍaṁ kadanapracaṁḍaṁ mānakanakā
caḷaṁ subhaṭarādityaṁ kaligaḷaṁkusaṁ gajasāmantaṁ śaraṇāgata vajrapaṁjaraṁ pratāpalaṁkē svaraṁ vairībhakaṁṭhīravaṁ paranārī
sahōdaraṁ śanivārasiddhi giridurggamallaṁ caladaṁkarāmaṁ nāmādi samastaprasasi sahitaṁ śrīmadbhuja baḷaca
kravartti tribhuvanamalla bijjaladēva vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddha mānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttami
re tatpāda padmōpajīvi . vṛtta . Anavadyākṛti saṁmōhanaṁ dānamartthinikāyēpsita kāryyasiddhinu
ḍi sāphalyōktisanmaṁtra śaktinitāntajanā manucāritra mātmīya va ṇḍa� māḍittene tatprabhāvadesadaṁ
daṁḍādhipa śrīdharaṁ . vacana . Ā maha nubhāvana vaṁśāvatāramentene . vṛtta . nutaśāṁḍilya gōtrajaḷadhibyābhāsipū
rṇnēṁduvistṟutapuṇyaṁ jayabhaṭṭanā vibhuvadhūratnaṁ tpatibrate jayūṁ bike tattanūjanatuḷaṁ satkīrttigaṁgānima
jjita dikkuṁjaranapratarkkyamahimaṁ daṁḍādhipaṁ śrīdharaṁ . Ā vibhugagrajanakhilōrbbīvinuta daṁḍanātha rāṇugi
diṭadiṁ bhāvikuṁ tanujātaṁ dēva viśada kīrtti lakṣmaṇadēva Avaroḍa huṭṭidaḷavanī bhuvanastuta siriyadēvi tat
priyakāntaṁ viśadeyaśaṁ kavinutanānaṁdabhaṭṭadaṁḍādhīśaṁ . Ānaṁdabhaṭṭa tanayaṁ bhūnuta vārṣṇēyagōtra nīra
jamitraṁ tāna kali tāne śuci sale tāne maha vēsugidēvaṁ . vacana Ā vīrāgragaṇya jananī sahōda
raṁ . vṛtta . sthirasatyavratadiṁ yudhiṣṭhirananārppiṁ karṇna ropaviḷādisa murahara prōdbhota
paṁ mṛgāṁka vara nirbbhara puṇyōdayanapratarkyamahimaṁ daṇḍādhipaṁ śrī
dharaṁ . kaṁda . yenippa bhāgaladēviyumā mahlaṇidēviyumurvvī vinutanatuḷa siddhugidēvaṁge
viḷāsavati tiyar . vṛtta . śrīvadhuventu viṣṇuge gaṅgāvadhuventu mahēśvaraṁge vāṇīvadhuve
ntu nīrajabhavaṁge manaḥpriyeyannirantaraṁ bhāvisuvante siddhugicamūpatigudgha mahatva mahlaṇidēvi ma
naḥ priye pramade tānene kaṇgesedaḷdharitriyoḷu . mattaṁ . parabhūpāḷāgradaṁḍādhipamada śikhiyaṁ naṁdisuttuṁ
nijādhīśvararājya śrīlatā manodavisuttuṁ ja�stōmaṁ bittaradindaṁ varddhisuttuṁ parivudeḷeyoḷante
ttaluṁ santataṁ śrīdhara daṁḍādhīśadōrmmaṁḍaḷika karāḷā nāṁtājaḷaughavacana . Adalladeyuṁ . vṛtta . va
nadhiparītabhūtaḷasamudbhava lakṣmige mukaraṁ nirantaraṁ namoppamanāḷva dhāriṇi
jananutamāda beḷvalakke saṁda negartte neṭṭa ramaṇīyamaṇnigeṟe sarvvajanōdgha sukhapradā
yakaṁ . vacana . Ā paṭṭaṇadoḷ . vṛtta . gāvuṇḍavarggaṁ vidhṛtabahukaḷānīka bhūdēvavarggaṁ puravarggaṁ matta
murvvīstutanagaramumudyadguṇarttaṁtuvāya śauryyadhuryyarppara mahitarenaltējapuṇya
prabhāvōddhuratējaṟpuṁja māgātrivarggaṁ . vacana . Ā trivarggakke jaṁga
mavajraprākāramenisi . kaṁda . mādhava koṇḍaṁ tantuvāyā nvayameṁbuda
dharādhara śikharadoḷudayisidaṁ bija nudayādityaṁ . vacana . Ā manuja puṇḍarīkana
bhujādaṇḍake maṇḍaḷāgra muṁ negaṟḍa kuṁnula boppula kāḷasēnareṁba
rī birudarkkaḷoḷprathita vīrabheṭarkkaḷ dore pāṭi kāminī para
ra paṭṭasāligarpparabaḷabhīmararijanaka stutaraṁ . vacana . Antu parama niratiśayame
nisi . kanda . bittarisidaṇnigeṟeyoḷati tāne modalene pesarvvettittu girijēśabhavanai
kōttama dhōrēśvaraṁ puraṁ budhaniḷayaṁ . kēśa vēśvaraṁ viśvadharāstuta ṇēśva
raṁ saṁgatiyiṁ rāṇēśvaraṁ samantivu saṁtataṁ . paramaśōbhākaramāda puravaradoḷ . vṛtta . ni
ravadyarvvahudēvaputrara nikāyaṁ baṁṭara naṁṭarssale paṭṭasāli garu ttama śrī
dharasthita dhōrēśvara pādapaṁkēruha bhṛṁgarvvīravairibrajōddhura mattadvipasiṁharā mesedarssāsirvvaru
rvvīsutar . vacana . Antu yapattana dēśādhinātha śrīdharacamū nātha vipuḷādhikāralakṣmī
nitaṁbiniganargghyamaṇibhoṣaṇaṁgaḷenisi . vṛtta . sthiracittaṁ [bhīmarājaṁ patihitanirataṁ boppadēvaṁ dharitrīdhara
dhairyyaṁ sōmanāthaṁ nirupamamahimaṁ dhareyaṁ sadguṇāḷaṁkaraṇaṁgaḷbeḷvala śrīgupa karaṇacayaṁ
tāmenalcelvuvetta karaṇaṁgaḷnālvaru sākṣara kīrṇna kaḷpāvanījar . © svasti śrīmattri
bhuvanamalla bijjaṇadēvavarṣada 2 neya Īśvara saṁvatsarada puṣya bahuḷa 8 budhavāra vutta rāya
ṇasaṁkramaṇadandu śrī manmahāpradhānaṁ beḷvalanāḍa perggaḍe daṁḍanāyaka śrīdharayyaṁ gaḷu śrī
karaṇa rājādhyakṣa bhīvaṇayyanāyakaruṁ boppaṇayyanāyakaruṁ sōvaṇayyanāya
karuṁ vēsugināyakaruṁ pramukhavāgi beḷvalanāḍaṁ tribhōgābhyantarasuddhiyiṁ sukhasaṁ kathā vinōdadi
nāḷuttamiṟdu śrīmaddakṣiṇa vāraṇāsi śrī dhōrēsvaradēvargge dēvara pūrvva taḷa vṛttiya po[®diṁ] brahma
puriyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu maṁṭūra baṭṭeyiṁ teṁkalu sāleyara kēsiyaṇnana keyyiṁdaṁ paḍu valu
sōviseṭṭiya keyyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu catussīmāsaṁśuddhiyiṁ dēvaraṁgabhōga dēgulada jīrṇnōddhāra
khaṁḍasphuṭitakkaṁ śrīmadrājadhānipaṭṭaṇavaṇnigeṟeya 33 gēṇu gaḍiṁbara gaḷeyoḷaḷedu sarvva
bādhāparihāramāge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa mattaru 20 Intī dharmmamanārō rvvaru dēśā
dhikārigaḷuṁ nāḍa karaṇaṁgaḷuṁ puruṣaruṁ samayaṁgaḷuṁ paripāḷi suvaru .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō dharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāya
tē krimiḥ . kaṁda . jananuta sāsirvvari keykoṁḍa niśaṁ bhīvaṇa
vibudhaṁ manamosadoḍe gaḷa . bhūvinute llaradēvaṁ jīrnnōjanāta
nātmajanā sadbhāvadiṁ kaṇḍarisidanā kīrtti nirupamaṁ rājōvajaṁ . © ©
Digital edition of SII 15.96 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
